prompt: Use image0 as the exact first frame and preserve its landscape composition, camera angle, subject identity, reading pose, clothing, lighting, and library background. The first frame shows a young East Asian woman standing in profile in a warm sunlit library aisle, leaning lightly beside the wooden bookshelf on the right side of the frame while reading an open book held in both hands. She has dark hair tied neatly into a low ponytail, smooth natural facial features, and a calm focused expression as she looks down at the pages. She wears a cream-colored mock-neck knit sweater with a subtle vertical cable-knit pattern down the center front. Around her are tall wooden bookshelves filled with books on both sides of the aisle, softly blurred books in the foreground, a bright window and reading area in the background, and warm diffused daylight filling the room. In the video, the woman first remains in the same side-profile reading pose and continues looking down at the open book. After a brief pause, she gently lifts her head from the page and slowly turns her gaze toward the camera while still holding the book. Her expression changes from quiet concentration to a warm, friendly smile. The camera may make only a subtle smooth shift from the side profile toward a slightly more frontal three-quarter view, without losing the original library aisle composition. Keep the motion natural and restrained, preserve the same warm lighting, sweater texture, ponytail, open book, wooden shelves, books, window glow, and stable facial identity throughout the video.
